title: Mariti in città
writer: Edoardo Anton, Suso Cecchi D'Amico, Luigi Comencini
actors: Nino Taranto, Renato Salvatori, Memmo Carotenuto
plot: In Rome every year in August the wifes go on holiday on the seashore while their husbands stay at home to work. It is the period of the year most suitable to male unfaithfulness. Without their wives they look for amorous adventure...
